author: Draupadi Devi
title: Nari Sudhar Bhajanawali
gloss: Or a collection of moral and religious songs for women.
notes: Women's moral-reform songbook by a woman author (Draupadi Devi) — female-authored reform verse.

author: Chuni Lal, Khanna
title: Mukammal Gulzar Bhajan
gloss: Or a collection of short religious songs.
notes: Bracket note: previous edition noticed in entry No. 44 at page 9 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 31st December 1906.

author: Dev Raj, Lala
title: Balodyan Sangit ki Pahili Kyari
notes: '(Designed for educational purposes.)' printed above entry. Kindergarten songbook — Froebelian pedagogy in Hindi; note the music-pedagogy thread (cf. 1910Q4 harmonium material).

author: Dev Raj, Lala
title: Balodyan Sangit
notes: Author dash-continuation of s6. verso index: 'p.6.1-2 Panjabi Surma' refers to the Punjabi—Biography entries below, not these.

title: Dhundhak Mat Parajaya
gloss: Or an account of two religious discussions between the Jaini Sadhus and Dhundhyas, a reformed sect of the Jains, in which the latter are said to have been defeated.
notes: Intra-Jain sectarian polemic (murtipujak vs Dhundhia/Sthanakvasi) — the smallest community's internal boundary disputes also in print. Triple date: Vir Samvat 2435, Atam Samvat 14, Bikram Samvat 1966.

author: Devi Dayal and Shiw Dayal, Lalas
title: Ganit Pustak, Pahla Bhag
gloss: An Arithmetic Book for the Lower Primary classes.

author: Shiv Brat Lal, M.A.
title: Punjabi Surma, Pahila Bhag
gloss: A brief account of the ten Sikh Gurus and their sufferings rendered from Shiv Brat Lal's Urdu original into Punjabi by Bhai Arur Singh.
notes: verso index: 'p.6.1-2 Panjabi Surma 1-2'. 416-page Sikh Gurus history, Urdu→Punjabi; same Shiv Brat Lal (Radhasoami figure) who edits the Sadhu Magazine (1910Q4 s4).

author: Shiv Brat Lal, M.A.
title: Punjabi Surma, Part II
gloss: An account of the courage and pluck exhibited by the Sikhs and the sufferings and persecution undergone by them for the sake of their religion.
notes: Author dash-continuation of s1; Part II.
